string.name: about_this_update
string.description: Title of the alert dialog that shows information about a model update. [CHAR_LIMIT=19]

string.name: all
string.description: Label for selecting or filtering all items (e.g., all models, all cutouts). [CHAR_LIMIT=5]

string.name: add
string.description: Button label to add a new item, such as a skill or server. [CHAR_LIMIT=5]

string.name: added
string.description: Label on a button indicating that an item (like a skill) has already been added. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: add_audio
string.description: Button label to add an audio input to the chat. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: aicore_access_panel_title
string.description: Informational message indicating that the user does not have access to the model yet. [CHAR_LIMIT=85]

resources.string: You cannot access this model yet. Please follow the steps and return when complete.

string.name: aicore_access_panel_button
string.description: Button label to open a guide on how to get access to AICore. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: aicore_image_limit_message
string.description: Warning message shown when the user tries to add more than 1 image to a chat session. [CHAR_LIMIT=101]

resources.string: The current model can only support 1 image per chat. To ask about another image, create a new chat.

string.name: model_not_support_image_message
string.description: Error message shown when the user tries to input an image to a model that doesn't support it. [CHAR_LIMIT=49]

resources.string: The current model does not support image input.

string.name: model_not_support_audio_message
string.description: Error message shown when the user tries to input audio to a model that doesn't support it. [CHAR_LIMIT=49]

resources.string: The current model does not support audio input.

string.name: aichat_initializing_title
string.description: Status indicator when initializing model. [CHAR_LIMIT=18]

string.name: aichat_initializing_content
string.description: Loading message shown while a chat or translator session is initializing. [CHAR_LIMIT=41]

resources.string: Sit tight, this can take up to 1 minute

string.name: app_intro
string.description: Introduction text shown on the home screen. [CHAR_LIMIT=50]

resources.string: Explore a world of amazing on-device models from

string.name: askimage_emptystate_content
string.description: Instructions shown when starting a chat with image input, explaining how to add images (up to 10). [CHAR_LIMIT=120]

resources.string: To get started, tap the + below to add an image (max 10 images per chat) and type a prompt to ask a question about it!

string.name: askimage_emptystate_content_aicore
string.description: Instructions shown when starting a chat with image input for AICore models, explaining how to add a single image. [CHAR_LIMIT=118]

resources.string: To get started, tap the + below to add an image (max 1 image per chat) and type a prompt to ask a question about it!

string.name: askaudio_emptystate_title
string.description: Title of the empty state screen when initiating an audio-based chat. [CHAR_LIMIT=11]

string.name: askaudio_emptystate_content
string.description: Instructions shown when starting a chat with audio input, explaining how to add a clip. [CHAR_LIMIT=139]

resources.string: To get started, tap the + below to add a audio clip (limited to 1 clip up to 30 seconds) and type a prompt to transcribe or translate it!

string.name: gallery_news_notification_title
string.description: Default title for push notifications about gallery news. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: baseline
string.description: Label for a button or chip to set a benchmark run as the comparison baseline. [CHAR_LIMIT=10]

string.name: basic_info
string.description: Header for a section showing basic information about a benchmark run. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: benchmark
string.description: Label or title referring to the benchmark functionality. [CHAR_LIMIT=11]

string.name: benchmark_comparison_help_title
string.description: Title of the help dialog explaining benchmark comparisons. [CHAR_LIMIT=31]

string.name: benchmark_comparison_help_content
string.description: Detailed instructions on how to compare benchmark results. [CHAR_LIMIT=227]

resources.string: Compare benchmark runs by tapping the **Baseline** chip on any run result card to set the run as the comparison baseline. We\'ll automatically calculate and display the percentage differences in **all other** run result cards.

string.name: benchmark_model
string.description: Title of the screen where users configure and run benchmarks. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: benchmark_results
string.description: Title of the screen that displays benchmark results. [CHAR_LIMIT=19]

string.name: benchmark_no_results
string.description: Message shown when there are no benchmark results to display. [CHAR_LIMIT=22]

string.name: benchmark_tokens_limit_message
string.description: Warning message explaining token limits for LLM benchmarking. [CHAR_LIMIT=111]

resources.string: Ensure that the sum of prefill and decode tokens remains under the model\'s maximum token limit (%1$d vs %2$d)

string.name: best_overall
string.description: Badge label indicating a model is the best overall choice. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: model_list_experimental_label
string.description: Label indicating a model is experimental. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: cancel
string.description: Common button label to cancel the current action or close a dialog. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: category_unlabeled
string.description: Category label for models that do not have a specific category. [CHAR_LIMIT=11]

string.name: category_llm
string.description: Category label for Large Language Models. [CHAR_LIMIT=5]

string.name: category_agents
string.description: Category label for AI Agents. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: category_classical_ml
string.description: Category label for Classical Machine Learning models. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: category_experimental
string.description: Category label for experimental features or models. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: chat_textinput_placeholder
string.description: Placeholder text in the chat input text field. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: chat_you
string.description: Label indicating a message was sent by the user. [CHAR_LIMIT=5]

string.name: chat_llm_agent_name
string.description: Display name for the LLM agent in chat. [CHAR_LIMIT=5]

string.name: show_thinking
string.description: Label for a button to show the model's reasoning/thinking steps. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: checking_access
string.description: Message shown while checking if the user has access to a model. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: close
string.description: Common button label to close a screen or dialog. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: collapse_all
string.description: Button label to collapse all expanded sections. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: discard
string.description: Button label to discard changes. [CHAR_LIMIT=9]

string.name: discard_changes_dialog_title
string.description: Title of confirmation dialog for discarding unsaved changes. [CHAR_LIMIT=18]

string.name: discard_changes_dialog_content
string.description: Content of confirmation dialog for discarding unsaved changes. [CHAR_LIMIT=66]

resources.string: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?

string.name: delete_benchmark_result_dialog_title
string.description: Title of confirmation dialog for deleting benchmark results. [CHAR_LIMIT=25]

string.name: delete_benchmark_result_dialog_content
string.description: Content of confirmation dialog for deleting benchmark results. [CHAR_LIMIT=55]

resources.string: Are you sure you want to delete the benchmark result?

string.name: error
string.description: Title for dialogs showing error messages. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: confirm_delete_model_dialog_title
string.description: Title of confirmation dialog for deleting a downloaded model. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: confirm_delete_model_dialog_content
string.description: Content of confirmation dialog for deleting a downloaded model. Contains model name placeholder. [CHAR_LIMIT=60]

resources.string: Are you sure you want to delete the downloaded model \"%s\"?

string.name: conversation_reset_message
string.description: Chat notification message indicating the conversation context was reset. [CHAR_LIMIT=24]

string.name: engin_reset_message
string.description: Chat notification message indicating the underlying model engine was reset. [CHAR_LIMIT=18]

string.name: chat_agent_agent_name
string.description: Display name for the AI Agent in chat. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: chat_generic_agent_name
string.description: Display name for the model in chat. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: chat_generic_result_name
string.description: Label indicating the result of a chat operation. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: clear
string.description: Content description for a button to clear text input. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: collect
string.description: Action label to collect items. [CHAR_LIMIT=9]

string.name: color
string.description: Label for color picker or color configuration. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: config_dialog_tab_model_configs
string.description: Tab label for model-specific configurations. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: config_dialog_tab_system_prompt
string.description: Tab label for system prompt configuration. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: config_dialog_title
string.description: Title of the settings/configuration dialog. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: benchmark_config_dialog_title
string.description: Title of the benchmark configuration dialog. [CHAR_LIMIT=19]

string.name: start
string.description: Button label to start benchmarking. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: continue_button_label
string.description: Button label to proceed to next step. [CHAR_LIMIT=10]

string.name: conversation_history
string.description: Title of the conversation history panel. [CHAR_LIMIT=22]

string.name: copy
string.description: Button label or action to copy text or data to clipboard. [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: create
string.description: Action label to create a new item. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: delete
string.description: Button label or action to delete an item. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: description_required
string.description: Label for a required description input field. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: disabled
string.description: Option label indicating a feature or mode is turned off. [CHAR_LIMIT=10]

string.name: dismiss
string.description: Button label to dismiss a help banner or promotional screen. [CHAR_LIMIT=9]

string.name: done
string.description: Button label to confirm completion of a task. [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: download
string.description: Button label to start downloading a model. [CHAR_LIMIT=10]

string.name: downloaded_size
string.description: Label showing how much data has been downloaded (e.g. '1.2 GB downloaded'). [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: drawer_settings_label
string.description: Label for the settings item in the navigation drawer. [CHAR_LIMIT=10]

string.name: drawer_settings_description
string.description: Description for the settings item in the navigation drawer. [CHAR_LIMIT=29]

string.name: drawer_models_label
string.description: Label for the models item in the navigation drawer. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: drawer_models_description
string.description: Description for the models item in the navigation drawer. [CHAR_LIMIT=35]

string.name: drawer_notifications_label
string.description: Label for the notifications item in the navigation drawer. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: drawer_notifications_description
string.description: Description for the notifications item in the navigation drawer. [CHAR_LIMIT=30]

string.name: notifications_title
string.description: Title of the notifications screen. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: notifications_empty_state
string.description: Message shown when there are no scheduled notifications. [CHAR_LIMIT=28]

string.name: notifications_delete_dialog_title
string.description: Title of confirmation dialog for deleting a notification. [CHAR_LIMIT=21]

string.name: notifications_delete_dialog_content
string.description: Content of confirmation dialog for deleting a notification. Contains notification title placeholder. [CHAR_LIMIT=66]

resources.string: Are you sure you want to delete the scheduled notification \"%s\"?

string.name: notifications_time_label
string.description: Label showing the scheduled time for a notification. [CHAR_LIMIT=10]

string.name: notifications_date_label
string.description: Label showing the scheduled date for a notification. [CHAR_LIMIT=10]

string.name: notifications_repeat_daily
string.description: Label indicating a notification repeats daily. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: notifications_repeat_one_time
string.description: Label indicating a notification is scheduled for one-time delivery. [CHAR_LIMIT=10]

string.name: edit
string.description: Button label or action to edit an item. [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: edit_secret
string.description: Title of dialog to edit a skill's API key/secret. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: enter_instruction
string.description: Placeholder text for instructing the model or agent. [CHAR_LIMIT=19]

string.name: expand_all
string.description: Button label to expand all collapsed sections. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: failed_to_save
string.description: Title of error dialog shown when saving a skill fails. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: flashlight_off_message
string.description: Chat message response confirming the flashlight was turned off. [CHAR_LIMIT=33]

string.name: flashlight_on_message
string.description: Chat message response confirming the flashlight was turned on. [CHAR_LIMIT=32]

string.name: function_name
string.description: Label for the name of a function called by the agent. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: generate_and_copy
string.description: Button label to generate a prompt and copy it to clipboard. [CHAR_LIMIT=19]

string.name: grant_permissions
string.description: Button label to request required system permissions. [CHAR_LIMIT=19]

string.name: grant_record_audio_permission
string.description: Button or dialog text to request audio recording permission from the user. [CHAR_LIMIT=31]

string.name: hold_down_to_talk
string.description: Instruction label on the voice recording button. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: input_history
string.description: Title or header for a section showing previous user inputs. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: instructions
string.description: Label for a text input field where the user enters instructions or behavior guidelines for a custom skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: introducing
string.description: Heading text used to introduce a new model or feature (e.g., 'Introducing Gemma 4'). [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: invalid_response
string.description: Error message displayed when the model's output is invalid or cannot be parsed. [CHAR_LIMIT=18]

string.name: learn_more
string.description: Hyperlink text that directs users to more information and the model's license terms. [CHAR_LIMIT=34]

resources.string: Learn more and see model license

string.name: listening
string.description: Status message indicating the app is actively listening to voice input for dictation. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: llm_camera_status_waiting_to_start
string.description: Status text shown when LlmCamera is initialized and waiting for user input. [CHAR_LIMIT=19]

string.name: llm_camera_status_loading_model
string.description: Status text shown while loading the LlmCamera model. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: llm_camera_status_listening
string.description: Status text shown when LlmCamera is listening to user speech. [CHAR_LIMIT=30] [BACKUP_MESSAGE_ID: 4062899179021837624]

string.name: llm_camera_status_processing
string.description: Status text shown while LlmCamera is processing speech or image input. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: llm_camera_status_cancelled
string.description: Status text shown when LlmCamera processing was cancelled. [CHAR_LIMIT=11]

string.name: llm_camera_status_responding
string.description: Status text shown while LlmCamera model is generating a response. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: llm_camera_status_done
string.description: Status text shown when LlmCamera finishes generating a response. [CHAR_LIMIT=15] [BACKUP_MESSAGE_ID: 5969525977325895045]

string.name: llm_camera_status_error
string.description: Status text template shown when an error occurs during LlmCamera operation. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: llm_camera_recognized_prefix
string.description: Prefix for recognized speech text in LlmCamera. [CHAR_LIMIT=18]

string.name: llm_camera_response_prefix
string.description: Prefix for model response text in LlmCamera. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: llm_camera_status_prefix
string.description: Prefix for current status text in LlmCamera. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: llm_camera_btn_start_listening
string.description: Button text to start speech recognition in LlmCamera. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: llm_camera_btn_stop_listening
string.description: Button text to stop speech recognition in LlmCamera. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: llm_camera_cd_toggle_mic
string.description: Content description for the microphone toggle button in LlmCamera. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: litert_community_label
string.description: Hyperlink text pointing to the LiteRT community webpage. [CHAR_LIMIT=18]

string.name: loading_model_list
string.description: Progress message displayed while the application fetches the list of available models. [CHAR_LIMIT=23]

string.name: logs_viewer_filter_text_input_placeholder
string.description: Placeholder text in a search/filter input field within the logs viewer screen. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: logs_viewer_title
string.description: Title of the screen that displays application or model logs. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: logs_viewer_no_matching_logs
string.description: Message shown when the user's filter query matches no log entries in the log viewer. [CHAR_LIMIT=26]

string.name: memory_warning_content
string.description: Warning message in a dialog explaining that the selected model might exceed the device's RAM, potentially causing crashes. [CHAR_LIMIT=156]

resources.string: The model you\'ve selected may exceed your device\'s memory, which can cause the app to crash. For the best experience, we recommend trying a smaller model.

string.name: memory_warning_proceed_anyway
string.description: Button label in the memory warning dialog to ignore the warning and load the model anyway. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: memory_warning_title
string.description: Title of the warning dialog regarding high memory usage by a model. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: max_tokens_warning_message
string.description: Warning message displayed when the user sets a high max token limit, indicating potential app instability. [CHAR_LIMIT=62]

resources.string: Setting max tokens above 10000 may cause app to be unstable.

string.name: model_is_initializing_msg
string.description: Status message showing that the machine learning model is currently loading or preparing. [CHAR_LIMIT=21]

string.name: model_list_imported_models_title
string.description: Section header in the model list for models that have been imported locally by the user. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: model_list_recommended_models_title
string.description: Section header in the model list for models recommended for download. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: model_manager
string.description: Title of the screen where users can manage (download, delete, import) models. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: model_manager_select_task_title
string.description: Header instructing the user to choose a specific task or use case to try with the models. [CHAR_LIMIT=26]

resources.string: Select a use case to try

string.name: model_not_downloaded_msg
string.description: Status message indicating a model must be downloaded before it can be used. [CHAR_LIMIT=26]

string.name: name
string.description: General label for a name field (e.g., config setting name or custom skill name). [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: no_cutouts_collected
string.description: Message shown when the user has not yet created or saved any image cutouts in the scrapbook feature. [CHAR_LIMIT=22]

string.name: notification_content_fail
string.description: Notification body text containing the model name when a model download fails. [CHAR_LIMIT=31]

string.name: notification_content_success
string.description: Notification body text containing the model name when a model download succeeds. [CHAR_LIMIT=32]

string.name: notification_title_fail
string.description: Notification title for a failed model download. [CHAR_LIMIT=23]

string.name: notification_title_success
string.description: Notification title for a successful model download. [CHAR_LIMIT=26]

string.name: ok
string.description: General confirmation button label. [CHAR_LIMIT=4]

string.name: paste_from_clipboard
string.description: Button label or action text to paste content from the device clipboard. [CHAR_LIMIT=22]

string.name: pick_from_album
string.description: Menu option to select an image from the device's photo gallery. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: preview
string.description: Label for a preview section, showing how the current edit looks (e.g., brush preview). [CHAR_LIMIT=9]

string.name: release_to_send
string.description: Instruction text telling the user to release the hold button to submit their voice input. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: replace
string.description: Button label in a confirmation dialog to overwrite or replace an existing skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=9]

string.name: results
string.description: Header for the section displaying benchmark performance results. [CHAR_LIMIT=9]

string.name: reset
string.description: Button label to reset the current task or model engine state. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: reset_note
string.description: Informational note in a dialog explaining that the reset action only affects the model engine, not game progress. [CHAR_LIMIT=88]

resources.string: Tapping \"Reset\" will reset LiteRT-LM engine only. The game progress won\'t be affected.

string.name: resetting_engine
string.description: Status message shown while the underlying model engine is being reinitialized. [CHAR_LIMIT=21]

string.name: restore_default
string.description: Button label to restore default model configurations. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: reinitializing_description
string.description: Supporting text explaining that resetting the engine does not lose game progress. [CHAR_LIMIT=37]

resources.string: The game progress won\'t be affected

string.name: run
string.description: Button label to start running or testing a custom skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=5]

string.name: running
string.description: Status indicator showing that a model or process is currently active and executing. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: run_again
string.description: Button label to resubmit a query or rerun a command in the chat. [CHAR_LIMIT=11]

string.name: run_benchmark
string.description: Action label to start performance benchmarking of a model. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: run_benchmark_confirmation_msg
string.description: Dialog message asking for confirmation before starting a long benchmark process. [CHAR_LIMIT=113]

resources.string: This process typically takes several minutes and cannot be interrupted once started. Would you like to proceed?

string.name: running_benchmark_msg
string.description: Status message displayed while model benchmarking is in progress. [CHAR_LIMIT=28]

string.name: save
string.description: Button label to save an item (e.g., image, collage, or skill changes). [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: secret
string.description: Label indicating a value or field is a secret key or sensitive credential. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: select_downloaded_model
string.description: Title of a dropdown/dialog to choose from models already downloaded for benchmarking. [CHAR_LIMIT=27]

string.name: select_model
string.description: Title of a dropdown/dialog to select a model (e.g., for viewing benchmark results). [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: selected_count
string.description: Label showing the count of selected items (e.g., '5 selected'). [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: settings_dialog_tos_title
string.description: Header for the Terms of Service section in the Settings dialog. [CHAR_LIMIT=18]

string.name: settings_dialog_view_app_terms_of_service
string.description: Button label to open and read the application's terms of service. [CHAR_LIMIT=27]

string.name: settings_dialog_gemma_prohibited_use_policy
string.description: Link text pointing to the Gemma model's prohibited use policy document. [CHAR_LIMIT=29]

string.name: settings_dialog_firebase_analytics_title
string.description: Title for the settings toggle control to opt-in/out of analytics tracking. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: settings_dialog_firebase_analytics_description
string.description: Description for the Firebase Analytics toggle explaining that it helps improve the app. [CHAR_LIMIT=49]

resources.string: Send usage data to help improve AI Edge Gallery

string.name: share
string.description: Button label to share content (images, text) via other apps. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: slide_up_to_cancel
string.description: Instruction text telling the user they can slide their finger up to cancel voice recording. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: system_prompt_placeholder
string.description: Placeholder hint text inside the system prompt editor text field showing example instructions. [CHAR_LIMIT=134]

resources.string: Enter system instructions (e.g., \"You are a versatile assistant. Provide accurate, context-aware responses in a professional tone.\")

string.name: system_prompt_updated
string.description: Confirmation message shown to the user when they successfully modify the system prompt. [CHAR_LIMIT=23]

string.name: submit
string.description: Button label to submit user feedback. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: take_a_picture
string.description: Menu option to capture a new photo using the device camera. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: tap_to_change_color
string.description: Button label indicating the user can tap it to open a color picker. [CHAR_LIMIT=21]

string.name: tap_to_see_value
string.description: Instruction text guiding users how to view specific data points on a benchmark chart. [CHAR_LIMIT=27]

resources.string: Tap on graph to see value

string.name: test
string.description: Button label or header for testing functionality. [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: text_image_generation_text_field_placeholder
string.description: Placeholder hint in a text field for generating images from text prompts. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: text_input_placeholder_llm_chat
string.description: Placeholder hint in the chat message input field (e.g., 'Type prompt...'). [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: tos_dialog_title_app
string.description: Title of the onboarding Terms of Service dialog. [CHAR_LIMIT=35]

resources.string: Welcome to Google AI Edge Gallery

string.name: tos_dialog_body
string.description: Main legal and privacy text inside the Terms of Service dialog, including links to Google policies. [CHAR_LIMIT=647]

resources.string:
By using this app, you agree to the [Google Terms of Service](https://policies.google.com/terms?hl=en-US).

To learn what information we collect and why, how we use it, and how to review and update it, please review the [Google Privacy Policy](https://policies.google.com/privacy?hl=en-US).

This app collects aggregated usage metrics to understand user engagement, such as error messages, app actions, IP inferred approximate location, OS version. This data is processed in accordance with the [Google Privacy Policy](https://policies.google.com/privacy?hl=en-US).

Your use of each model is subject to the applicable model license terms.

string.name: tos_dialog_title_gemma
string.description: Title of the terms dialog specific to using Gemma models. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: tos_dialog_accept_and_continue_button_label
string.description: Button label to accept the app terms and proceed. [CHAR_LIMIT=19]

string.name: tos_dialog_agree_and_continue_button_label
string.description: Button label to agree to Gemma model terms and proceed. [CHAR_LIMIT=18]

string.name: try_it
string.description: Button label to open a task/screen and start interacting with the downloaded model. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: turn_on_all
string.description: Action label to enable or select all items in a list (e.g., plugins, skills). [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: turn_off_all
string.description: Action label to disable or deselect all items in a list. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: undo
string.description: Action button label to revert the last action. [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: use
string.description: Accessibility content description for a button or icon that applies or uses a trigger/setting. [CHAR_LIMIT=5]

string.name: unsupported_action
string.description: Error message shown when the model attempts an action that the app cannot execute. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: set_screen_brightness_message
string.description: Status message indicating the app set the screen brightness to a specific percentage. [CHAR_LIMIT=43]

resources.string: I\'ve set the screen brightness to %1$d%%.

string.name: set_timer_message
string.description: Status message indicating the app is setting a timer for a specific number of seconds. [CHAR_LIMIT=37]

string.name: add_calendar_event_message
string.description: Status message confirming a calendar event is being added. [CHAR_LIMIT=53]

string.name: take_picture_message
string.description: Status message confirming the camera app is being opened. [CHAR_LIMIT=25]

string.name: mobile_actions_description
string.description: Subtitle/description of the Mobile Actions feature, explaining users can control the device. [CHAR_LIMIT=42]

resources.string: Control your device with simple commands

string.name: mobile_actions_supported_actions
string.description: Header for the list of sample commands supported by the mobile actions model. [CHAR_LIMIT=27]

string.name: mobile_actions_tab_model_response
string.description: Tab title showing the raw text output from the model in Mobile Actions screen. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: mobile_actions_tab_function_called
string.description: Tab title showing the structured function calls made by the model in Mobile Actions screen. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: update
string.description: Button label to update a model to a newer version. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: update_available
string.description: Label indicating a new version of the model is available. [CHAR_LIMIT=18]

string.name: view_results
string.description: Button label to navigate to the benchmark results viewer. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: view_console_logs
string.description: Action chip label to open the log viewer overlay for a specific message/run. [CHAR_LIMIT=19]

string.name: warming_up
string.description: Status message indicating the model is warming up/preparing before running inference. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: warning_no_function_call
string.description: Fallback response text when the agent model fails to map the user input to a function call or action. [CHAR_LIMIT=84]

resources.string: I could not quite understand that. Could you try again with more specific details?

string.name: snackbar_no_function_call
string.description: Short message shown in a toast/snackbar when the user command didn't trigger any function. [CHAR_LIMIT=24]

string.name: unknown_error
string.description: Generic fallback error message text when a more specific error message is not available. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: view
string.description: General action label to view details of an item (e.g., tool or skill). [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: view_in_full_screen
string.description: Action chip label to expand a web view content into full screen modal. [CHAR_LIMIT=21]

string.name: snackbar_save_to_album_success
string.description: Success notification message shown when an image is saved to the gallery. [CHAR_LIMIT=22]

string.name: snackbar_save_to_album_failed
string.description: Failure notification message shown when saving an image to the gallery fails. [CHAR_LIMIT=31]

resources.string: Failed to save to photo album

string.name: snackbar_copy_to_clipboard_success
string.description: Success notification message shown when text is copied to the clipboard. [CHAR_LIMIT=21]

string.name: prompt_template_label_flash_on_off
string.description: Label for a sample action button to toggle the device flashlight on or off. [CHAR_LIMIT=24]

string.name: prompt_template_label_flash_on
string.description: Label for a prompt template that requests to turn on the flashlight. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: prompt_template_label_flash_off
string.description: Label for a prompt template that requests to turn off the flashlight. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: prompt_template_label_create_contact
string.description: Label for a prompt template or a sample action button to create a new contact. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: prompt_template_label_send_email
string.description: Label for a prompt template or a sample action button to send an email. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: prompt_template_label_create_calendar_event
string.description: Label for a prompt template or a sample action button to create a calendar event. [CHAR_LIMIT=23]

string.name: prompt_template_label_show_location_on_map
string.description: Label for a prompt template or a sample action button to show a location on a map. [CHAR_LIMIT=22]

string.name: prompt_template_label_open_wifi_settings
string.description: Label for a prompt template or a sample action button to open Wi-Fi settings. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: mobile_actions_challenge_title
string.description: Title of a challenge dialog where users are prompted to fine-tune a model. %s is the name of the feature (e.g., "Mobile Actions"). [CHAR_LIMIT=23]

string.name: mobile_actions_challenge_subtitle
string.description: Subtitle of the challenge dialog, encouraging the user to build/fine-tune the model to use it. [CHAR_LIMIT=22]

string.name: mobile_actions_challenge_description
string.description: Description explaining that the demo is locked and the user needs to compile the model to unlock it. %s is the name of the agent/feature. [CHAR_LIMIT=115]

resources.string: This demo is locked. To unlock the %s agent, you need to compile the model yourself using our open-source recipe.

string.name: mobile_actions_challenge_instructions_title
string.description: Header for the list of instructions on how to unlock the demo. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: mobile_actions_challenge_instruction_1
string.description: First step of instructions, directing the user to open a link on their computer. [CHAR_LIMIT=131]

string.name: mobile_actions_challenge_instruction_2
string.description: Second step of instructions, telling the user to fine-tune and convert the model. [CHAR_LIMIT=87]

resources.string: 2. Follow the instructions to fine tune the model and convert it to .litertlm format.

string.name: mobile_actions_challenge_instruction_3
string.description: Third step of instructions, telling the user to transfer the converted model file to the phone. [CHAR_LIMIT=37]

resources.string: 3. Transfer the file to this phone.

string.name: mobile_actions_challenge_instruction_4
string.description: Fourth step of instructions, telling the user to tap the button to load the model. [CHAR_LIMIT=64]

resources.string: 4. Tap Load Model below to unlock the demo.

string.name: mobile_actions_challenge_email_colab
string.description: Button label to send the link to the guide/colab to the user's email. [CHAR_LIMIT=23]

string.name: mobile_actions_challenge_load_model
string.description: Button label to initiate loading the custom-built model. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: aichat_emptystate_content
string.description: Description text shown on the empty state screen of the AI Chat feature, explaining what it does. [CHAR_LIMIT=44]

resources.string: Chat with on-device large language models.

string.name: add_script
string.description: Title of the dialog for adding a new script to a skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: add_default_script
string.description: Button label to add a template or default script when no scripts exist yet. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: add_skill
string.description: Title of the bottom sheet containing options to add a new skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=11]

string.name: add_skill_option_view_community_skills_title
string.description: Title of the option to explore community-contributed skills. [CHAR_LIMIT=23]

string.name: add_skill_option_view_community_skills_description
string.description: Description for the option to view community skills, explaining where they are hosted (GitHub discussions). [CHAR_LIMIT=60]

resources.string: Explore community contributed skills on GitHub discussions

string.name: add_skill_option_featured_list_title
string.description: Title of the option to add a skill from a pre-defined featured list. [CHAR_LIMIT=30]

string.name: add_skill_option_featured_list_description
string.description: Description for the option to add a skill from the featured list. [CHAR_LIMIT=65]

resources.string: Add a skill from a curated list of community contributed skills

string.name: add_skill_option_url_title
string.description: Title of the option to load a skill by providing its URL. [CHAR_LIMIT=21]

string.name: add_skill_option_url_description
string.description: Description for the option to load a skill from a URL. [CHAR_LIMIT=50]

resources.string: Enter the URL of a skill directory hosted on Web

string.name: add_skill_option_local_title
string.description: Title of the option to import a skill from local storage. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: add_skill_option_local_description
string.description: Description for the option to import a local skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=36]

string.name: add_skill_option_skill_creator_title
string.description: Title of the option to create a new skill from scratch using an in-app creator. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: add_skill_option_skill_creator_description
string.description: Description for the option to create a skill from scratch within the app. [CHAR_LIMIT=36]

resources.string: Create a skill from scratch in-app

string.name: add_skill_from_url_dialog_title
string.description: Title of the dialog where users can input a URL to add a skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: add_skill_dialog_title_from_local_import
string.description: Title of the dialog for importing a skill from the device's local storage. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: add_skill_dialog_subtitle_from_local_import
string.description: Instructions for developers on how to prepare the skill directory on the device before importing it. [CHAR_LIMIT=71]

resources.string: Please first \"adb push\" the whole skill directory to /sdcard/Download

string.name: add_skill_manual_input_sheet_title
string.description: Title of the bottom sheet when the user is creating a new skill manually. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: disclaimer_dialog_content
string.description: Disclaimer warning users about the risks of using third-party skills. [CHAR_LIMIT=345]

resources.string:
Third-party skills are not authored or endorsed by Google. Google is not responsible for their contents, security, or data handling practices.

Please exercise caution before providing sensitive information, such as personal identification, tokens, or API keys.

Any use of an Agent Skill is subject to the applicable terms for that Skill.

string.name: disclaimer_dialog_title
string.description: Title of the disclaimer dialog shown when adding a third-party skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=23]

string.name: disclaimer_dialog_agree
string.description: Button label to agree to the disclaimer terms and proceed. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: delete_script_dialog_title
string.description: Title of the confirmation dialog shown before deleting a script. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: delete_skill_dialog_title
string.description: Title of the confirmation dialog shown before deleting a skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: delete_skill_dialog_content
string.description: Confirmation message asking the user if they are sure they want to delete the skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=44]

resources.string: Are you sure you want to delete the skill?

string.name: delete_selected_skills_title
string.description: Title of the confirmation dialog shown when deleting multiple selected skills in batch mode. [CHAR_LIMIT=24]

plurals.name: delete_selected_skills_content
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to delete %d skill?
Are you sure you want to delete %d skills?

string.name: built_in_skills_title
string.description: Section header for skills that are built into the application. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: custom_skills_title
string.description: Section header for skills that have been added or created by the user. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: describe_requirements
string.description: Label for the input field where the user describes the requirements for the LLM prompt to be generated. [CHAR_LIMIT=23]

string.name: describe_input_data
string.description: Label for the input field where the user describes the structure or content of the input data for the skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=21]

string.name: describe_input_data_support_text
string.description: Help text explaining that input data field names must match those used in the skill instructions. [CHAR_LIMIT=57]

resources.string: The field names need to match the ones in instructions.

string.name: describe_output_data
string.description: Label for the input field where the user describes the expected output data from the skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=22]

string.name: duplicated_script_name
string.description: Error message shown when the user tries to create a script with a name that is already in use within the skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=24]

string.name: enable_skill_dialog_content
string.description: Message instructing the user to enable a skill before they can use it. [CHAR_LIMIT=60]

resources.string: Please enable the skill by tapping the Skills button below

string.name: edit_skill
string.description: Label or title for editing an existing skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: enter_skill_url
string.description: Label for the text input field where the user enters the URL of the skill they want to load. [CHAR_LIMIT=37]

resources.string: Enter URL of skill\'s root directory

string.name: featured_skills_title
string.description: Title of the bottom sheet that displays a curated list of featured skills. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: featured_skills_description
string.description: Description explaining what the featured skills list is. [CHAR_LIMIT=48]

resources.string: A curated list of community contributed skills

string.name: generate_llm_prompt_title
string.description: Title of the bottom sheet used to generate a prompt for an LLM to help write skill code. [CHAR_LIMIT=21]

string.name: generate_llm_prompt_button_label
string.description: Label on a button that triggers the generation of an LLM prompt. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: learn_how_to_write_skills
string.description: Link or button text directing users to documentation on how to create their own skills. [CHAR_LIMIT=27]

string.name: loading_skills_allowlist
string.description: Loading message shown while the list of featured skills is being fetched. [CHAR_LIMIT=28]

string.name: manage_skills
string.description: Title of the screen/bottom sheet where users can manage their skills. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: manage_skills_description
string.description: Description text explaining the purpose of the Skill Manager. [CHAR_LIMIT=38]

resources.string: View, create, and manage your skills

string.name: skill_limit_warning
string.description: Warning message displayed when too many skills are enabled, which might slow down the app. %s is the maximum recommended number of enabled skills. [CHAR_LIMIT=47]

resources.string: Enabling more than %s may impact performance.

string.name: no_directory_selected
string.description: Text displayed when no local directory has been selected for importing a skill. [CHAR_LIMIT=23]

string.name: pick_skill_dir
string.description: Label instructing the user to select the root directory of the skill they want to import. [CHAR_LIMIT=29]

string.name: prompt_copied_message
string.description: Message informing the user that the prompt has been copied and instructing them on what to do next. [CHAR_LIMIT=116]

resources.string: Prompt copied to clipboard. Paste it into your favorite LLM app to generate the code and copy/paste the code here.

string.name: prompt_chip_kitchen_adventure
string.description: Label for a quick-start prompt chip related to a kitchen or cooking scenario. [CHAR_LIMIT=19]

string.name: prompt_chip_calculate_hash
string.description: Label for a quick-start prompt chip to calculate a hash (e.g., MD5, SHA). [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: prompt_chip_query_wikipedia
string.description: Label for a quick-start prompt chip to search Wikipedia. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: prompt_chip_plot_chart
string.description: Label for a quick-start prompt chip to generate or plot a chart. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: prompt_chip_interactive_map
string.description: Label for a quick-start prompt chip to show an interactive map. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: prompt_chip_text_spinner
string.description: Label for a quick-start prompt chip, possibly a fun or demo action. [CHAR_LIMIT=23]

string.name: prompt_chip_send_email
string.description: Label for a quick-start prompt chip to send an email. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: replace_skill_dialog_title
string.description: Title of the dialog asking to confirm replacing an existing skill with the same name. [CHAR_LIMIT=24]

string.name: replace_skill_dialog_content
string.description: Message asking the user if they want to overwrite an existing skill that has the same name. [CHAR_LIMIT=71]

resources.string: A skill with the same name already exists. Do you want to replace it?

string.name: search_skill
string.description: Placeholder text in a search bar to search for skills. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: select_script
string.description: Label for a dropdown menu to select which script to view or edit. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: script_name
string.description: Label for the text input field where the user enters the name of a new script. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: script_content
string.description: Label or header for the content/code of a script. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: skills
string.description: Label for the button that opens the skill management options. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: skill_name_input_description
string.description: Help text indicating that the skill name is required and suggesting a kebab-case format. [CHAR_LIMIT=40]

resources.string: REQUIRED. In the form of my-skill-name

string.name: skill_description_input_description
string.description: Help text explaining what should be entered in the skill description field. [CHAR_LIMIT=91]

resources.string: REQUIRED. A brief description of the skill\'s function and trigger conditions or keywords.

string.name: skill_instructions_input_description
string.description: Help text explaining what should be entered in the skill instructions field (markdown format for LLM). [CHAR_LIMIT=87]

resources.string: Detailed instructions in Markdown format that LLM must follow to accomplish the task.

string.name: use_call_js_template
string.description: Button label to pre-fill the instructions field with a template for calling JavaScript code. [CHAR_LIMIT=22]

string.name: mcp
string.description: Label for the button that opens the Model Context Protocol (MCP) manager. [CHAR_LIMIT=5]

string.name: mcp_tool_call_permission_title
string.description: Title of the dialog asking the user for permission to execute an MCP tool. [CHAR_LIMIT=30]

string.name: mcp_tool_name_label
string.description: Label prefixing the name of the tool requesting execution permission. [CHAR_LIMIT=11]

string.name: mcp_tool_input_label
string.description: Label prefixing the input arguments being passed to the tool. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: mcp_tool_always_allow
string.description: Button label to grant permanent permission for the tool to run without asking again. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: mcp_tool_allow_once
string.description: Button label to grant one-time permission for the tool to run. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: mcp_tool_dont_allow
string.description: Button label to deny permission for the tool to run. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: mcp_tool_revoke
string.description: Button label to confirm revoking automatic permission for a tool. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: mcp_tool_revoke_permission
string.description: Button label to initiate revoking "always allow" permission for a tool. [CHAR_LIMIT=29]

string.name: mcp_tool_revoke_permission_title
string.description: Title of the confirmation dialog for revoking tool permission. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: mcp_tool_revoke_permission_content
string.description: Message asking the user if they are sure they want to revoke the automatic execution permission for the tool. [CHAR_LIMIT=77]

resources.string: Are you sure you want to revoke permission to automatically call this tool?

string.name: manage_mcp_servers
string.description: Title of the screen/bottom sheet where users can manage Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: add_mcp_server
string.description: Button label to add a new MCP server. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: learn_more_about_mcp
string.description: Link text directing users to documentation about Model Context Protocol (MCP). [CHAR_LIMIT=48]

resources.string: Learn more about MCP in Google AI Edge Gallery

string.name: learn_more_about_mcp_short
string.description: Link text to learn more about MCP (Model Context Protocol). [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: search_mcp_server
string.description: Placeholder text in a search field to search for an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server. [CHAR_LIMIT=26]

string.name: add_mcp_server_from_url_dialog_title
string.description: Title of the dialog used to add a new MCP server by entering its URL. [CHAR_LIMIT=25]

string.name: enter_mcp_server_url
string.description: Label for the text field where the user enters the MCP server URL. [CHAR_LIMIT=22]

string.name: delete_mcp_server_dialog_title
string.description: Title of the confirmation dialog when deleting an MCP server. [CHAR_LIMIT=19]

string.name: delete_mcp_server_dialog_content
string.description: Content text of the confirmation dialog when deleting an MCP server. [CHAR_LIMIT=50]

resources.string: Are you sure you want to delete this MCP server?

string.name: manage_tools
string.description: Title of the bottom sheet or section for managing tools associated with MCP servers. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: mcp_server_label
string.description: Label displaying the name or URL of the MCP server. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: mcp_tool_description
string.description: Label for the description section of a tool. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: mcp_tool_schema
string.description: Label for the input schema section of a tool. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: mcp_disclaimer_dialog_title
string.description: Title of the disclaimer dialog shown when adding a third-party MCP server. [CHAR_LIMIT=21]

string.name: mcp_disclaimer_dialog_content
string.description: Disclaimer text informing the user about risks of using third-party MCP servers. [CHAR_LIMIT=333]

resources.string:
Third-party MCPs are not authored or endorsed by Google. Google is not responsible for their contents, security, or data handling practices.

Please exercise caution before providing sensitive information, such as personal identification, tokens, or API keys.

Any use of an MCP is subject to the applicable terms for that MCP.

string.name: mcp_server_duplicate_title
string.description: Title of the dialog warning the user that the MCP server URL is already added. [CHAR_LIMIT=22]

string.name: mcp_server_duplicate_content
string.description: Content text warning that the MCP server URL is duplicate. [CHAR_LIMIT=39]

resources.string: This MCP server URL is already added.

string.name: mcp_server_authorization
string.description: Label for the authorization configuration section when adding an MCP server. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: mcp_server_auth_none
string.description: Option indicating no authorization is needed for the MCP server. [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: mcp_server_auth_request_header
string.description: Option indicating authorization via request headers. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: mcp_server_auth_oauth_wip
string.description: Option indicating OAuth authorization (Work In Progress). [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: mcp_server_header_name
string.description: Label for the input field where the user enters the authorization header name. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: mcp_server_header_value
string.description: Label for the input field where the user enters the authorization header value. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: chat_history_title
string.description: Title of the chat history side sheet or screen. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: new_chat
string.description: Button label to start a new chat session. [CHAR_LIMIT=10]

string.name: clear_all
string.description: Button label to clear all chat history. [CHAR_LIMIT=11]

string.name: chat_history_demo_notice
string.description: Informational message stating that chat history is temporary and not saved permanently. [CHAR_LIMIT=45]

resources.string: Chat history does not persist across demos.

string.name: clear_history_dialog_title
string.description: Title of the confirmation dialog when clearing chat history. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: clear_history_dialog_content
string.description: Content text warning that clearing history is permanent. [CHAR_LIMIT=75]

resources.string: Are you sure you want to clear the history? This action cannot be undone.

string.name: import_model_terms_subtitle
string.description: Subtitle in the import model bottom sheet reminding users to adhere to separate model terms. [CHAR_LIMIT=78]

resources.string: You are responsible for adhering to any separate terms applicable to models.

string.name: cd_import_model_from_hugging_face
string.description: Content description spoken when the import model from hugging face button is focused. [CHAR_LIMIT=32]

string.name: import_model_from_hugging_face
string.description: Text label on the button/option to import a model from Hugging Face. [CHAR_LIMIT=19]

string.name: import_from_hugging_face_title
string.description: Title of the dialog box for importing a model from Hugging Face. [CHAR_LIMIT=26]

string.name: enter_hugging_face_url
string.description: Prompt text to guide the user to enter a Hugging Face model URL. [CHAR_LIMIT=56]

resources.string: "Enter the Hugging Face model file URL, for example: "

string.name: hugging_face_url_placeholder
string.description: Placeholder text shown inside the text field where the user enters the URL. [CHAR_LIMIT=26]

string.name: next
string.description: Button text to navigate to the next step. [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: unsupported_model_title
string.description: Title of the dialog showing that the imported model type is unsupported. [CHAR_LIMIT=24]

string.name: unsupported_file_type_error
string.description: Message informing the user that only .task or .litertlm file formats are supported. [CHAR_LIMIT=53]

resources.string: Only \".task\" or \".litertlm\" file type is supported.

string.name: unsupported_web_model_error
string.description: Message explaining that the model is only for web browsers and not supported on the Android application. [CHAR_LIMIT=75]

resources.string: Looks like the model is a web-only model and is not supported by the app.

string.name: cd_add_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the "Add" button icon. [CHAR_LIMIT=5]

string.name: cd_import_model_button
string.description: Accessibility description for the Floating Action Button to import a model. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: cd_task_card
string.description: Accessibility description for a task card, indicating the task name and number of models. [CHAR_LIMIT=28]

string.name: cd_error
string.description: Accessibility description for error icons. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: cd_import_model_from_local_file_button
string.description: Accessibility description for the option to import a model from a local file. [CHAR_LIMIT=30]

string.name: cd_navigate_back_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the back navigation button. [CHAR_LIMIT=9]

string.name: cd_app_settings_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the app settings button. [CHAR_LIMIT=10]

string.name: cd_done_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the "Done" or save button icon. [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: cd_collapse_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the button to collapse a view or section. [CHAR_LIMIT=10]

string.name: cd_expand_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the button to expand a view or section. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: cd_stop_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the "Stop" button (e.g., to stop generation or download). [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: cd_delete_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the "Delete" button icon. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: cd_close_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the "Close" button icon. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: cd_selected_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the icon indicating an item is selected. [CHAR_LIMIT=10]

string.name: cd_model_settings_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the model configuration settings button. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: cd_reset_session_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the button to reset the current session. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: cd_change_model
string.description: Accessibility description for the model picker chip, indicating the current model and how to change it. [CHAR_LIMIT=45]

resources.string: Current model is %1$s. Tap to change model.

string.name: cd_close_image_viewer_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the button to close the image viewer. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: cd_copy_to_clipboard_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the "Copy to clipboard" button. [CHAR_LIMIT=19]

string.name: cd_prompt_input_text_field
string.description: Accessibility description for the prompt input text field. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: cd_send_prompt_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the "Send prompt" button. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: cd_model_response_text
string.description: Accessibility description for the area displaying the model's response. [CHAR_LIMIT=21]

string.name: cd_clear_input_history_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the button to clear all input history. [CHAR_LIMIT=21]

string.name: cd_delete_input_history_entry_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the button to delete a single history entry. [CHAR_LIMIT=28]

string.name: cd_content_input_field
string.description: Accessibility description for the content input field in prompt templates. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: cd_add_example_prompt_icon
string.description: Accessibility description for the button to add an example prompt. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: cd_image_thumbnail
string.description: Accessibility description for the thumbnail of an attached image. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: cd_user_image
string.description: Accessibility description for an image sent by the user, indicating its index. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: cd_user_image_in_group
string.description: Content description for an image in a group of images sent by the user, indicating its position and total count (e.g., 'User image 1 of 3'). [CHAR_LIMIT=25]

string.name: cd_add_content_icon
string.description: Content description for the button to add content (like attachments or images) to a message. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: cd_camera_shutter_icon
string.description: Content description for the camera shutter button to take a picture. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: cd_toggle_front_back_camera_icon
string.description: Content description for the button to switch between the front and back cameras. [CHAR_LIMIT=29]

string.name: cd_pick_file
string.description: Content description for the button to select a file or directory from local storage. [CHAR_LIMIT=11]

string.name: cd_play_audio_icon
string.description: Content description for the button to start audio playback. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: cd_stop_playback_icon
string.description: Content description for the button to stop audio playback. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: cd_send_audio_clip_icon
string.description: Content description for the button to send a recorded audio clip. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: cd_start_recording
string.description: Content description for the button to start recording audio. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: cd_downloaded_icon
string.description: Content description for the icon indicating that a model has been successfully downloaded. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: cd_not_downloaded_icon
string.description: Content description for the icon indicating that a model has not been downloaded. [CHAR_LIMIT=16]

string.name: cd_downloading_icon
string.description: Content description for the icon indicating that a model download is in progress. [CHAR_LIMIT=13]

string.name: cd_download_failed_icon
string.description: Content description for the icon indicating that a model download has failed. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: cd_chat_panel
string.description: Content description for the main chat interface panel. [CHAR_LIMIT=12]

string.name: cd_switch_to_keyboard
string.description: Content description for the button to switch the input mode to keyboard text entry. [CHAR_LIMIT=20]

string.name: cd_switch_to_voice
string.description: Content description for the button to switch the input mode to voice recording. [CHAR_LIMIT=17]

string.name: cd_show_history
string.description: Content description for a button that displays history (e.g., chat history, action history). [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: cd_more_options
string.description: Content description for the button that opens a menu with additional options. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: cd_help
string.description: Content description for the help icon button. [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: cd_menu
string.description: Content description for the main navigation menu button (hamburger menu). [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: cd_scroll_to_bottom
string.description: Content description for the button that scrolls the list/chat to the bottom. [CHAR_LIMIT=18]

string.name: cd_chat_history
string.description: Content description for the button that shows the chat history. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: import_model
string.description: Title of the dialog that allows users to import a model from their local storage. [CHAR_LIMIT=14]

string.name: import_action
string.description: Label for the button that confirms and starts the model import process. [CHAR_LIMIT=8]

string.name: failed_to_import
string.description: Error message shown when a model import process fails. [CHAR_LIMIT=18]

string.name: error_internet_connection
string.description: Error message advising the user to check their internet connection. [CHAR_LIMIT=60]

resources.string: Please check your internet connection and try again later.

string.name: retry
string.description: Label for a button to retry a failed operation (e.g., reloading data). [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: theme_title
string.description: Label for the settings section or configuration key where users can choose the visual theme of the app (e.g., Light, Dark). [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: third_party_libraries
string.description: Label for the settings section that contains information about third-party libraries used in the app. [CHAR_LIMIT=23]

string.name: view_licenses
string.description: Label for the button that opens the screen displaying licenses for third-party libraries. [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: theme_auto
string.description: Label for the system-default or automatic theme option, which follows the system settings. [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: theme_light
string.description: Label for the light theme option. [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: theme_dark
string.description: Label for the dark theme option. [CHAR_LIMIT=6]

string.name: unknown
string.description: Fallback label when the theme state is unknown or undefined. [CHAR_LIMIT=9]

string.name: stats
string.description: Label or header for the section displaying performance statistics of a message generation (e.g., speed, tokens). [CHAR_LIMIT=7]

string.name: acknowledge_user_agreement
string.description: Title of the dialog asking the user to acknowledge and agree to a user agreement before downloading a model. [CHAR_LIMIT=28]

string.name: gated_model_agreement_help
string.description: Instruction explaining that the model is gated and the user must agree to terms externally before downloading. [CHAR_LIMIT=170]

resources.string: This is a gated model. Please click the button below to view and agree to the user agreement. After accepting, simply close that tab to proceed with the model download.

string.name: open_user_agreement
string.description: Label for the button that opens the user agreement in a web browser. [CHAR_LIMIT=21]

string.name: error_unknown_network
string.description: Title for the error dialog when an unspecified network error occurs. [CHAR_LIMIT=23]

string.name: error_check_internet
string.description: Message in the network error dialog asking the user to verify their internet connection. [CHAR_LIMIT=40]

string.name: disabled_skill_dialog_title
string.description: Title of the alert dialog indicating that a specific agent skill (passed as a parameter) is disabled. [CHAR_LIMIT=38]

string.name: agent_skills_intro
string.description: Introductory text explaining what agent skills are, with HTML links to documentation/discussions and a placeholder for the agent name. [CHAR_LIMIT=271]

resources.string: Use specialized, high-order reasoning by loading different skills or creating your own. Explore community contributed skills on GitHub discussions.\n\nTry tapping a sample prompt below to see %3$s in action!
Number of turns before the conversation resets

string.name: stats_on_accelerator
string.description: Label for the section displaying performance statistics on a specific hardware accelerator (e.g., 'Stats on GPU'). [CHAR_LIMIT=15]

string.name: gemma4_intro_part_1
string.description: First part of the introductory text on the home screen, preceding a link to the LiteRT community. [CHAR_LIMIT=53]

resources.string: Discover the power of on-device AI models from the

string.name: gemma4_intro_part_2
string.description: Second part of the introductory text, connecting the LiteRT community link and the Gemma 4 link. [CHAR_LIMIT=26]

string.name: new_badge
string.description: Badge label indicating a new feature. [CHAR_LIMIT=5]

string.name: llm_camera_cd_flip_camera
string.description: Content description for the flip button in LlmCamera. Camera is a generic term. [CHAR_LIMIT=30]
